results.title: US Justice Department drops all fraud charges against Gautam Adani, his nephew; case closed permanently
results.description: The closure marks a dramatic shift in a case that could have disrupted the Adani Group's global expansion plans. The case turned in Gautam Adani's favour after prosecutors found no direct US ties and insufficient proof to sustain the allegations. The post US Justice Department drops all fraud charges against Gautam Adani, his nephew; case closed permanently appeared first on News24 .

results.title: Suvendu Government Turns Heat On Abhishek Banerjee, Notices Slapped On His Kolkata Residence
results.description: Kolkata civic authorities launched a probe into properties linked to Abhishek Banerjee and associates, pasting Section 401 notices at multiple locations including the TMC leader's Harish Mukherjee Road residence 'Shantiniketan'.

results.title: US approves $428 million Apache helicopter, M777 howitzer support deals for India
results.description: US approves possible Foreign Military Sales to India for Apache helicopter and M777A2 howitzer sustainment, worth about 198.2 billion and 230 million, to bolster defence ties

results.title: OMCs Hike Petrol & Diesel Prices For 2nd Time In A Week Amid Global Oil Shock
results.description: Fuel prices in India have risen once again, with state-run oil marketing companies increasing petrol and diesel rates for the second time in less than a week amid soaring global crude oil prices. On Tuesday, petrol prices were increased by 86 paise per litre, while diesel prices went up by 83 paise per litre. In [...] The post OMCs Hike Petrol & Diesel Prices For 2nd Time In A Week Amid Global Oil Shock appeared first on Pragativadi I Latest Odisha News in English I Breaking News .

results.title: Haryana CM Promotes Fuel Conservation by Cycling to Sukna Lake
results.description: Chandigarh, May 19: In response to Prime Minister Narendra Modi’s appeal for fuel conservation amid the global energy crisis, Haryana Chief Minister Nayab Singh Saini took to cycling on Tuesday. He rode to the rainwater-filled Sukna Lake and then embarked on his morning walk. A government spokesperson informed that during his walk, CM Saini interacted ...
